command: cd "C:/Users/Cameron/Projects/peon-ping/.claude/worktrees/agent-a46f06a1" && mkdir -p .gitban/agents/router/logs && mkdir -p .gitban/agents/executor/inbox && export AGENT_LOG_DIR=".gitban/agents/router/logs" && export AGENT_ROLE="router" && export AGENT_SPRINT_TAG="TECHDEBT" && export AGENT_CARD_ID="n5uqeo" && export AGENT_CYCLE="1" && source "C:/Users/Cameron/Projects/peon-ping/.gitban/hooks/agent-log.sh" && agent_log_init && agent_log_event "read-review" '{"file":".gitban/agents/reviewer/inbox/TECHDEBT-n5uqeo-reviewer-1.md","verdict":"APPROVAL"}' && echo "DONE"

LOGFILE="C:/Users/Cameron/Projects/peon-ping/.claude/worktrees/agent-a46f06a1/.gitban/agents/router/logs/TECHDEBT-lyq5ta-router-1.jsonl"
